title: Wreck Attack
desciption:
Something new is bubbling up in Bingo Blitz…! ⛲

Welcome to Wreck Attack, where your bingo skills don’t just win you rewards — they let you shake things up and challenge other Blitzers along the way.

sections.body: More rewards, more action, more ways to play — that’s what Wreck Attack is all about. 🎯Play Bingo rounds, earn duplicate Collection Items, fill your fountain, unlock milestones, and dive into a whole lot of fun!

sections.title: HOW TO PLAY
sections.body:
Jump into seasonal rooms or unfinished cities on the islands and start getting bingos! ⭐Each bingo earns you Collection Item duplicates, which now have a whole new value!

Fill your fountain all the way to claim the credits inside — and along the way, you’ll hit milestones packed with rewards before moving on to the next fountain.

And don’t worry — you can still trade all your duplicates anytime! ✨

sections.title: HOW TO WRECK
sections.body: During bingo rounds, keep an eye out for Wreck and Shield symbols. Daub them to unlock powerful actions!

sub_sections.title: 💥 Wreck Attacks
sub_sections.body:
Jump into Wreck Attack where you’ll be matched with another player — either automatically or from your Revenge list.

Not happy with your opponent? Hit Shuffle to switch to someone who attacked you before! 🔄😈

sub_sections.title: 🛡️ Shields
sub_sections.body:
Protect your fountain with up to 3 shields. Each shield blocks one incoming attack. When a shield is used, it disappears — and the next one steps in automatically.

Got extra shields? No problem! Any extras are converted into Power-Ups 🎉

title: Chef Moxie’s Western Saloon
desciption: Howdy, partner! Welcome to Chef Moxie’s Western Saloon, where the food is hot, the rewards are rich, and the kitchen never sleeps.Roll up your sleeves—it’s time to cook!

sections.body:
Saddle up for a flavorful journey at Chef Moxie’s Western Saloon.
Gather your ingredients, fire up the stove, and bring the spirit of the Wild West to every dish.

sections.title: How it works
sections.body:
Join Moxie, gather the finest Ingredients this side of Bingo Blitz, and cook up the most mouthwatering cowboy meals—earning bountiful rewards along the trail!

Let’s rustle up every delicious Western dish in Chef Moxie’s Western Saloon.

sections.title: Menu
sections.body: Grab your notepad, jot down the orders, and serve up hearty meals inspired by the most iconic chuckwagons of the Wild West.

sub_sections.title: What’s on the menu?
sub_sections.body:
Three main categories, each inspired by a different corner of frontier cooking! Unlock them one by one to discover the specialties waiting inside.

With every dish you prepare, Credits and Chef Points are added straight to your stash!

Complete all 3 categories to earn the Grand Reward—now that’s a legendary haul!

sections.title: Ingredients
sections.body:
Gather the Ingredients you need from Baskets.
Where do you find these Baskets? Just about everywhere—Bingo rounds, Seasonal Events, Quests, Chef Class benefits, Purchases, and more!

sections.title: Pantry Spree
sections.body: Meet the fantastic booster that helps collect Missing Ingredients and Pantry Passes—the Pantry Spree!

sections.title: Pantry
sections.body: Need to check your Ingredient stock? Visit your Pantry—right next to your Pantry Passes. Just click it to see everything it holds!

sections.title: Garden
sections.body: Visit Moxie’s Garden, where you can grow fresh produce just like a seasoned homesteader—right in Bingo Blitz.

sections.title: Pantry Passes
sections.body:
Missing that one key Ingredient for a meal worthy of a grand frontier feast? No problem—Pantry Passes have your back!
Use them to instantly grab a missing ingredient.

There are three types of Pantry Passes based on ingredient rarity:
• Bronze – collect any Ingredient up to ** rarity
• Silver – collect any Ingredient up to **** rarity
• Gold – collect any Ingredient, including Special or Moxie ones!

sections.title: Chef Brigade
sections.body: Chef Points bring exclusive, extravagant rewards! Earn Chef Points by cooking dishes, completing menus and claiming prizes as you advance on your culinary journey.

sections.title: Special & Winston Dishes
sections.body: Winston will ride into town from time to time, bringing bold new recipes and premium rewards! The dishes come with extra-special bonuses—don’t let them pass you by!
